changes: Added Step 0-obs: per-issue run_id computation (compact ISO-8601 basic-format '{ISSUE-ID}_{YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ}') and pipeline-started webhook after state.json init, inside the batch loop for each issue
Step 2 (triage): added pre-dispatch usage init writes (started_at, model='sonnet', status: in_progress, counters=0) and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: triage)
Step 3 (code-analyst): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: code_analysis)

Step 3e (browser reproduction): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: reproduction; reproducer agent maps to 'reproduction' canonical stage key)

Step 4 (fixer) / Step 6 (reviewer): added pre-loop fixer_reviewer stage init before first fixer dispatch; cumulative usage accumulation per fixer/reviewer invocation (COST-R5, no per-iteration array); step-completed webhook fires ONCE on loop completion (APPROVE or exhaustion) with iteration_count (WEBHOOK-R6)
Step 7 (test-engineer): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: test)
Step 7a-deploy (deployment-verifier): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: deployment)
Step 7b (e2e-test-engineer): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: e2e_test)
Step 7b-browser (browser-verifier): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: browser_verification)
Step 7c (acceptance-gate): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: acceptance_gate)
Step 8 (publisher): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: publisher)

Added Step 8-obs: per-issue pipeline accumulator (total_tokens, total_duration_ms, total_tool_uses, summary_table with COST-R10 truncation at 20 rows / 4000 chars) written BEFORE terminal status; pipeline.summary_table echoed to stdout per issue; pipeline-completed webhook fired after terminal status write (outcome: success or blocked)
gate1_constraints_respected: No autopilot-started / autopilot-completed batch-level events (out of scope per Gate 1)
WEBHOOK-R6: step-completed fires once per top-level stage, not per fixer-reviewer iteration
WEBHOOK-R7: no step-skipped events, no webhooks for skipped stages
On events filter applied to EACH per-issue event
State-commit ordering respected: state.json atomically committed before webhook fires
Per-issue state.json independence maintained (parallel worktrees safe)
